title: October 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 30''' is the 303rd day of the year (304th in leap years), with 62 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Hamilton Camp]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Rusty Goffe]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Paul Engelen]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[P. Craig Russell]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Miguel A. Fuertes]] is born.
*1957 – [[Kevin Pollak]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Paulina Gillis]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Tory Belleci]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Simon Lowe]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Carla Tassara]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Graham Ashley]] dies.
*[[2001]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 44]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[The Walt Disney Company]] buys out [[Lucasfilm]] and announces the creation of [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']].
*[[2013]] – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 4|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 4]] released.
*[[2017]] – "[[An Imperial Feast]]" premieres on YouTube.
*2017 – "[[The Occupation]]" and "[[Flight of the Defender]]" premiere on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Battlefront II]] [[Grievous|General Grievous]] update released.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 4]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Allegiance 4|''Allegiance'' 4]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Insider 193|''Star Wars Insider'' 193]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle 5|''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' 5]] published.
*2019 – [[Doctor Aphra Annual 3|''Doctor Aphra Annual'' 3]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 27|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 27]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Chapter 9: The Marshal]]" premieres on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – [[Luke Skywalker (booklet)|''Luke Skywalker'']] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising 3|''Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising'' 3]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 11|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 11]] published.
